\documentclass{article}

% NeurIPS 2026 style file not yet published on neurips.cc (~May 2026).
% Using neurips_2025.sty as the working draft; replace with neurips_2026.sty
% once the official 2026 template is released.
% Default options = anonymous + main track (double-blind), which is what
% the submission requires.
\usepackage{neurips_2025}

% xelatex pipeline: Unicode-native, drops inputenc + fontenc.
% fontspec alone handles all the Greek + arrows + math symbols in body
% text. Pandoc converts in-math symbols to \sqrt/\geq/etc. so we don't
% need unicode-math (which conflicts with amssymb's \eth).
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{url}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{amsfonts}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{nicefrac}
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{calc}        % required by pandoc's longtable column-width calc
\usepackage{listings}

% Pandoc 3.x emits \real{0.25} in table column widths; provide a passthrough.
\providecommand{\real}[1]{#1}

\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    citecolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue
}

% Pandoc-required macros for fenced-divs / quotes / tightlist
\providecommand{\tightlist}{%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}
\providecommand{\passthrough}[1]{#1}

% Allow long code blocks to break across pages.
% literate map: Unicode glyphs that appear inside \lstinline / lstlisting
% must be converted to LaTeX commands because listings reads its body
% as raw 8-bit input.
\lstset{
  breaklines=true,
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
  extendedchars=true,
  literate=
    {→}{{$\to$}}1
    {≈}{{$\approx$}}1
    {≥}{{$\geq$}}1
    {≤}{{$\leq$}}1
    {≠}{{$\neq$}}1
    {×}{{$\times$}}1
    {±}{{$\pm$}}1
    {²}{{$^2$}}1
    {³}{{$^3$}}1
    {√}{{$\sqrt{}$}}1
    {₂}{{$_2$}}1
    {₃}{{$_3$}}1
}

\title{Fisher Information Tier Hierarchy: A Panel-Bounded Empirical
       Regularity of Deep Layered Sequential Computation}

% Anonymous track: the NeurIPS template's default [anonymous] option
% renders the author block as "Anonymous Author(s)" automatically.
% Do not put author identity here pre-acceptance.

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\input{body.tex}

\end{document}
